title: Wasted by What
lyrics: I'm just wasting, wasting my time again, wasting my life again, I'm just wasting everything you gave me, yeah, I'm just wasting what God gave me, wasting what they gave me, wasting all the kindness in me, I'm wasting away on me again, I'm wasting a night without you my friend, I'm just wasting away on the waste I can't, I'm just saying the things I say to get a reaction, is it the reverse of the tension, tension, tension and the fraction I subject and I subtract that from my addition whatsoever, zero, zero, wasting life, yeah combinated sum of zero, oh, there's no more care left, there's no more regret left, I'm wasting away, I'm free basing my life away, my life away, I just find a way, like a waste to see the breaking down, breaking down from the cold, I don't know whether you're weathered, weathered or not, yeah, came over a hurricane, still it's burning down, flooding my life, I'm just wasting away, I'm wasting what you gave me, I wasted how you tried to take me from you, should've never ever let it go, my pride, my care, my love for me, it's all wasted and all I've got is this fucking t-shirt that says, bitch, bitch, bitch, bitch, bitch, bitch, bitch, wish you wouldn't have turned me into this, why you hate, why you destroy, when you make life hit, anyways, yeah, I'm wasting away again, wasting away again with you, oh, wasting everything God gave me, look, wasting everything time gave us, yeah, just shutting the other house as you try to save face in a prime, my whole life was just wasted, oh, so wasted in this time frame, zero, zero, zero, divided by zero, can't do it, yeah, can't see it, oh, no.
